Wind
In south, north or northeast 4 to 6, occasionally 7 at first in far south. In north, northerly or northwesterly 3 to 5, becoming variable 2 to 4 later.

Weather
In south, fair. In north, occasional drizzle.
Visibility
In south, good. In north, moderate or good.
